dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: They want you afraid.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: Fear makes you easier to control.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: It's time to wake up.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Your streets, so once again, run red with your blood.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: Raul Menendez ignited global unrest on an unprecedented scale.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: Menendez is a terrorist.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: We're bringing peace and security to the world.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 4
dialogue_segments.text: He refuses to let me go.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: Stop looking backwards, David, but matters is what we do next.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: A lot of people counting on us, Francis.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: Specter one, report.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: Need a sitrep.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 4
dialogue_segments.text: This isn't real.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: The hell it ain't!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Obey your master!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Control your master!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Master of the invisible and the screen!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Crushing your mind, crushing your dreams!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: You're my puppet, you can't see the strings!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Just know my name is all you scream!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Master! When the dream turns into a disaster!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Master! Master!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Just obey your master!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: Pull it together, man!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: So eager to lead the dance.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Killing the man is a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: You were never cut out to be a mason.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: No more games. This ends now.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Obey your master!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 5
dialogue_segments.text: Get the Resnov challenge pack when you pre-order now.

summary: This audio is a promotional trailer for the video game Call of Duty: Black Ops II, featuring dramatic narration, character dialogue, and a musical sequence.
